occupation: Chief Executive Officer at Route Research Ltd.
headline: CEO at Route Research
summary: I am the CEO of Route Research. We provide Great Britain's out-of-home (OOH) advertising industry with data on who sees ads on posters and digital screens. We are a global leader in OOH measurement, with a mission to deliver trusted, independent data for over 400,000 posters and screens.

experiences.title: Chief Strategy Officer
experiences.description: Responsible for the technical aspects of Route's methodology and chair of the cross-industry Technical Advisory Group. Led on the tender and award of the new contract for Route's evolving methodology and was involved at all stages of the process from brief specification, proposal evaluation, through to contract negotiation.

experiences.title: General Manager
experiences.description: Working as the go-to person for OOH audience measurement information and insight in the UK. Necessitates the translation of complex research into human speak. Responsible for industry training get people up to speed. Led various multiple stakeholder groups and committees. Developed significant expertise in eye-tracking and attention research.

experiences.title: Director
experiences.description: Working within the strategy and insight team this multi-faceted role featured significant business development responsibilities, research design, project management and insight generation and presentation. Spanned a multitude of projects ranging across media, finance, FMCG categories, utilising qualitative and quantitative methods both in the UK and internationally.

experiences.title: Director
experiences.description: Responsible for pitching and winning media research projects to meet financial targets. Led a multi-disciplinary team comprising research and design. Regular presenter at industry conferences and contributor to white papers and trade press articles. Responsible for designing, managing and delivering on a wide range of media research projects across all channels spanning qual and quant methods. Developed a keen interest in Data Visualisation and was responsible for setting up the first 'data design' resource within the UK team.

experiences.title: Senior Insight Executive
experiences.description: Responsible for a range of commercial insight studies to support the sales of advertising. Key role in translating the data into suitable insights. Played a key role in the setup  and management of an online community.  The role also included a variety of brand and product research studies.

experiences.title: Marketing
experiences.description: Responsible for the project management and presentation of JICREG readership research and insight generation to support commercial and editorial teams.
